query:
ALTER TABLE kpi_deals 
ADD COLUMN inventoryStatus ENUM('for_sale', 'assigned', 'funded') DEFAULT 'for_sale',
ADD COLUMN location ENUM('nashville', 'nash_sw', 'knoxville', 'chattanooga', 'global', 'nah'),
ADD COLUMN lmName ENUM('chris', 'daniel'),
ADD COLUMN amName ENUM('kyle'),
ADD COLUMN dmName ENUM('esteban', 'steve'),
ADD COLUMN isNah ENUM('yes', 'no') DEFAULT 'no';
